message:
bench(messaging): add criterion benchmarks for FABRIC hot paths

Subject routing (literal, wildcard, link cache, sharded, scaled),
CRDT merge/delta (InterestSummary, CursorCheckpoint, LagSketch,
MembershipView), morphism transform application (identity, rename,
hash, compose, extract, split), pattern matching, and subscribe/
unsubscribe throughput.

Closes asupersync-8w83i.17.6.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -326,6 +326,11 @@ harness = false
 name = "load_balancer_benchmark"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "fabric_bench"
+harness = false
+required-features = ["messaging-fabric"]
+
 [[bench]]
 name = "scheduler_browser_bench"
 harness = false
